How it works

From conversation
to live product.

From needs mapping to configuration, integration and launch with speed and precision.

We map your needs.

Distribution, customers and product ambitions.

02

Products, APIs and operations tailored to your model.

Licensing, risk and compliance handled across markets.

European Footprint

across Europe.

About Eir

A Swedish licensed carrier
built for modern distribution.

Eir combines insurance infrastructure, technology and licensing into
a scalable platform for distribution partners across Europe.

Licensed by
Swedish FSA
Founded
2019
HQ
Stockholm
About Eir →

A fully licensed insurance company offering purely digital, scalable insurance products to distribution partners across Europe.

Licensed across Europe · API-first · Cloud-native
